benefits.description: Memory recovery - whole chunks of life that were gone started returning
Mental clarity, felt calmer and more present, brain could finally breathe again
Speech and movement recovery following stroke
Improvement in physical balance (in combination with PT/OT)
No regression during 8-week off cycles; continued sense of progression

protocol_notes: Protocol is 8 weeks on followed by 8 weeks off, cycling consistently since starting. OP went straight to sub-q injections. OP declined to post full protocol publicly but shared via private messages. Approximately 2 years of use referenced. Still has slight balance issues. Also plans to start oxytocin for social difficulties. Has a 'handbook' passed on to them that guides their protocol.
